title: amauropelta neglecta
intro: Amauropelta neglecta, a species of fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Amauropelta neglecta has been used in herbal preparations to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and it is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions. However, further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Amauropelta neglecta for medicinal purposes.
